extension.description: Convert images and text to Unicode art inside VSCode.
command.convertSelectionWithOptions: UnicodeArtJs: Generate Unicode Art With Options
command.generateWithDefaultTemplate: UnicodeArtJs: Generate Unicode Art: Default Template
submenu.customTemplates: UnicodeArtJs: Generate Unicode Art: Custom Template
config.width: Output width in columns. Use null for automatic width.
config.customChars: Custom characters ordered from dark to light when charset is CUSTOM.
config.visualFont: Visual font used when rendering input text before conversion.
config.glyphFont: Glyph display font used for preview and downstream rendering.
config.glyphWidthProfile: Glyph width profile name. Reserved for future wide glyph rules.
config.wideCharRegex: Custom wide glyph regular expression. Reserved for future wide glyph rules.
config.fontReduce: Visual font rendering inset / shrink value.
config.trimTrailingSpaces: Trim trailing spaces from generated lines.
config.box.enabled: Enable box rendering around generated art.
config.box.title: Optional title rendered in the box border.
config.box.shadow: Render a simple box shadow when box rendering is enabled.
config.insertMode: How generated art should be inserted after converting a selection.
